title: euodia parvifolia
intro: Euodia parvifolia, also known as the Chinese prickly-ash or small-leaved Euodia, is a plant species native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Euodia parvifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as the flu and pneumonia. Euodia parvifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
